mapper.select: /** UsptTaskPrtcmpnyHistDao.selectList */ select task_partcptn_entrprs_hist_id ,task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id ,entrps_nm ,rspnber_nm ,clsf_nm ,enc_telno ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_email ,tlsy_regist_no ,member_id /*업체 회원ID*/ ,(select cm.member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = utph.member_id ) as entrpsNm /*업체명*/ from uspt_task_prtcmpny_hist utph where task_prtcmpny_info_hist_id = #{taskPrtcmpnyInfoHistId}
